organization.name: NayePankh Foundation
organization.tagline: It's that easy to bring a Smile on Their Faces

programs.name: Food Distribution
programs.description: Providing nutritious meals to underprivileged families across Kanpur and Ghaziabad

programs.name: Hygiene & Sanitation
programs.description: Distributing sanitary napkins and conducting hygiene awareness campaigns for young women and girls
programs.impact: Hundreds of women reached with hygiene education

programs.name: Clothing Drives
programs.description: Collecting and distributing clothes to marginalized communities, especially during winters
programs.impact: Seasonal drives helping hundreds of families

programs.name: Education Initiative
programs.description: Teaching underprivileged children, providing study materials, and conducting educational awareness programs to break the poverty cycle
programs.impact: Regular teaching sessions in Kanpur and Ghaziabad

programs.name: Animal Welfare
programs.description: Feeding stray animals and conducting awareness about animal welfare
programs.impact: Regular feeding drives for stray dogs and cats

volunteering.how_to_join: Contact us at contact@nayepankh.com or through the chatbot to express your interest. Our city coordinator will reach out within 24 hours.
volunteering.requirements: No specific requirements — just passion and commitment to our mission!
volunteering.time_commitment: Flexible — even a few hours a week makes a difference

internships.stipend: Voluntary (unpaid) internship with certificate and experience
internships.how_to_apply: Email your resume to contact@nayepankh.com with subject line 'Internship Application'

donations.tax_benefit: Yes — 50% tax exemption under Section 80G of the Indian Income Tax Act
donations.min_amount: Any amount is welcome — every rupee counts!
donations.receipt: Donation receipts provided for all contributions
donations.how_to_donate: Visit nayepankh.com and click 'Donate Now', or ask me to guide you!

faq.question: Is NayePankh Foundation a legitimate NGO?
faq.answer: Yes! NayePankh Foundation is registered with the UP Government and holds both 80G and 12A certifications, making donations eligible for tax exemption.

faq.question: Can I get a tax benefit on my donation?
faq.answer: Yes! Donations to NayePankh are eligible for 50% tax exemption under Section 80G of the Indian Income Tax Act. We provide official receipts for all donations.

faq.question: How can I volunteer?
faq.answer: You can volunteer by sharing your name, email, city, and skills through this chat. Our city coordinator will contact you within 24 hours!

faq.question: What cities are you active in?
faq.answer: We are currently active in Kanpur and Ghaziabad, with plans to expand further.

faq.question: How was NayePankh started?
faq.answer: NayePankh Foundation was started in 2021 by Prashant Shukla and fellow high school students during the COVID-19 pandemic to help communities in need. What began as a small relief effort has grown into a registered NGO with hundreds of volunteers.

faq.question: Can I apply for an internship?
faq.answer: Yes! We offer internships in AI/tech, content creation, social media, and event management. Email contact@nayepankh.com with subject 'Internship Application' along with your resume.
